title: Interior Castle: The Seventh Mansion
description: Teresa's map of the soul: seven mansions leading to the center where God dwells. The seventh is spiritual marriage.
introduction: Teresa's map of the soul: seven mansions leading to the center where God dwells. The seventh is spiritual marriage.

translation.text: In this seventh mansion, the soul enters a new life. It is as if a small stream enters the sea and cannot be separated from it again.
